projects.name: Brigadier
projects.headline: Bypass Roblox's abusive filter through both text and voice chat.
projects.description:
Brigadier is a modding tool which allows you to bypass the Roblox filter in a large variety of ways. Enjoy a wholesome world of swearing and slurs whenever you use Brigadier. It's available in every single form of Roblox communication: in-game text chat, DM's and group chats, personal messages, and even voice chat (coming February, for a small extra fee).

Worried about privacy? No worries, only other Brigadier users can see the explicit messages you type. Not even Roblox staff can see the messages; it's that hidden.

The Discord server is private and closed source, with over 5,000 premium users. Brigadier only costs US$15. Brigadier is included as part of Umbra; Roblox's smartest modding tool, currently in development.

projects.name: Umbra
projects.description: Umbra is Roblox's smartest modding tool.

projects.name: GBA Online (gba.js.org)
projects.headline: The best GameBoy Advance emulator.  (probably)
projects.description: GBA Online is a light-weight online emulator for the GameBoy Advance based on Iodine. It's hosted online at gba.js.org.

projects.name: Deepsquid
projects.description: Deepsquid, the smartest script hub. Currently in client-side development.

projects.name: Pokédex Online
projects.description: An online global Pokédex, dynamically generated using data grabbed from PokéApi.

projects.name: Simple PiP
projects.headline: Picture-in-Picture, but simpler.
projects.description: A simple Chrome extension to pop out videos.
